analysis.hook: recognizable cosplay silhouette with curiosity crop in the first seconds
analysis.camera_style: lo-fi selfie cosplay plus repeated medium shot plus tight face crop reveal

segments.label: cutaway_question_mark
segments.purpose: contrast cutaway that raises the question

segments.label: return_and_escalate
segments.purpose: repeat the main shot with a small prop or gesture change

segments.label: rapid_punchline
segments.purpose: quick punchline on face detail and final recognition

adaptation_rules: copy rhythm and reveal logic, not Harry Potter itself
keep a recognizable anchor in the first two seconds
use one repeated medium shot before the reveal
end on a tight crop or identity punchline
for branded remixes replace the final identity reveal with a product or brand reveal
